title: Stock Market Today (Apr. 30, 2026): S&P 500 caps off best month since 2020 as Alphabet rallies, Apple beats

excerpt: The S&P 500 had its best month since 2020 in April 2026, driven by strong performances from Alphabet and Apple. Qualcomm and Alphabet led the rally, while Meta Platforms and Microsoft saw declines. For detailed updates, refer to financial news sources.

content.introduction: The S&P 500 had its best month since 2020 in April 2026, driven by strong performances from Alphabet and Apple. Qualcomm and Alphabet led the rally, while Meta Platforms and Microsoft saw declines. For detailed updates, refer to financial news sources.
